prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: IGE-ASR-EAGLE-SET-DAGGER Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 3pc Collector's Etched Fixed Blade Hunting Knife Bald Dagger Patriotic American Collector Set - Eagle Description: This Patriotic 3pc American Bald Eagle Dagger Collector's Set displays beautiful artwork and craftsmanship, and would make a great gift for any knife collector, dagger enthusiast, and/or red blooded American.

This collector's set features a black design, white design, and American flag design that have all been acid etched for extra appeal. All three daggers depict a soaring bald eagle that is sure to impress friends and visitors.

The blade of the daggers is 8" in length and is made from strong 440 Stainless Steel. The total knife length is 13.75" from point to pommel.

Makes a great gift. Search Terms: patriotic dagger bald eagle collectible Features: - SPECIAL EDITION DECORATIVE KNIFE: These wild animal daggers are quite the addition to any knife collection set: The Animal Head Fixed Blade Hunting Daggers feature an intricate outdoor graphic design of their spirit in full color from scabbard and handle - PREMIUM QUALITY CRAFTSMANSHIP: Constructed from 440 stainless steel these fixed blade animal head knives have an eye catching and heavy weighted 8 inch acid etched blade while overall being 13.75 inches in length - ORNAMENTAL POMMEL AND SHEATH: From tip to pommel a matching wild animal outdoor graphic adorns this stainless steel dagger in full color that will surly impress one and all. Each fixed blade animal head dagger has a 5.5" handle with a solid ornamental animal head pommel full color graphic scabbard and handle - WILDLIFE FIXED BLADE DECORATIVE COLLECTORS KNIFE: Included in this 3 piece knife collection is a Wolf, Eagle, and Fantasy Dragon ornamental dagger each a unique character in the wild - UNIQUE AND ENJOYABLE: Makes a great addition to any knife collection or wildlife enthusiast center piece === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3-pc Patriotic Bald Eagle Dagger Collector Set

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3-Pc 8in Patriotic Bald Eagle Dagger Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 8In 440 Stainless Steel Acid Etched Blades, Fixed Blade Daggers, Ornamental Pommel, Full Color Graphic Scabbard, 1375In Total Length

openai.title_differentiation: 440 Stainless Steel, Acid Etched Blade, Full Color Eagle Artwork, 3 Piece Collector Set, Gift For Collectors
